description_long: This is a rectangular sheet cake with a map-themed edible image on its top surface, bordered by thick, piped white icing. The cake's sides are covered in a generous layer of creamy white frosting, with decorative ruffles and swirls along the top and bottom edges. The map image features blue, green, and white colors, possibly representing continents and oceans, and includes some small, colorful icons or symbols. The cake sits on a piece of parchment or wax paper, which is placed on a brown, flat tray or board. The overall appearance is festive and suitable for a themed celebration, such as a geography or travel event. The cake appears to be a single-tier, classic sheet cake, likely made of sponge cake and buttercream.
description: Rectangular sheet cake with a map-themed edible image and piped white icing borders, displayed on parchment over a brown tray. The cake is decorated in a festive, themed style with colorful map details.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thick, piped white icing and the edge of the map image on top.
description_view_1: Long side view highlighting the ruffled icing border and a wide expanse of the map image.
description_view_2: Opposite long side view with visible piped icing and the map image extending across the top.
description_view_3: Front view showing the clean, piped icing border and a clear look at the map image's details.
